group_1.narration: Why does everyone keep asking me questions@that I don't understand?
Why don't I know what's right?
Tamaki-san saved Magical Girls everywhere,@so why are they doing all of these unnecessary things?
...Right. The answer is obvious,@now that I think about it.
A tomorrow without her is worthless...
The day she disappeared@was definitely "The End" for me.
Why do I have to keep living past that?

group_1.textRight: Did you find the person you were looking for,@Miss?

group_1.textLeft: No.
She's nowhere to be found anymore.
...Did you find your father?

group_1.textRight: I didn't.
Maybe we're in the same boat...
I never managed to track my father down...
...but I might get off at the next stop anyway.

group_1.textLeft: Wh... Are you sure you're okay with that?

group_1.textRight: Yeah.
I may be a nobody...
...but the fact that I'm my father's son will never@change.
No matter how cloudy my memories get as the@days go by...
...my father is absolutely part of my past...
...and that's never going to disappear.

group_1.textLeft: But he's not going to be here today or tomorrow,@is he?

group_1.textRight: It's true that all I can take with me into tomorrow@are bits and pieces of my memories of him...
And I'm sure that even those will fade one day.
That's why, if nothing else...
...I need to make up my mind to say goodbye@before I get off this train...
Thank goodness you're okay, Kuroe-sa...
[flashEffect:flashRed1][chara:104700:effect_shake]Urgh...!

group_1.textLeft: Why are you here...?

group_1.textRight: You were about to get swallowed up by your@Doppel...
...so I thought I should try to rescue you, but...
I ended up getting sucked in, too. E-ehehe...
[flashEffect:flashRed1][chara:104700:effect_shake]Grk...

group_1.textLeft: Are you okay...?

group_1.textRight: It's kinda stuffy in here... Let's hurry up and@escape...!
Kuroe-san...?

group_1.textLeft: ...You can go without me.

group_1.textRight: Eh?

group_1.textLeft: If I leave...I'll have to go to tomorrow.

group_1.textRight: Hwuh??

group_1.textLeft: ...I'm, well...
I'm not the kind of Magical Girl you think I am.

group_1.textRight: Huh??? Wh-what brings this on?

group_1.textLeft: The real me can't make her own decisions.
I wanted to be like the person I looked up to...
Helping people and spreading hope.
I...wanted to become a Magical Girl.
But I couldn't...

group_1.textRight: What are you talking about?!
Kuroe-san! You helped me, right?!

group_1.textLeft: No... I didn't.
You just happened to be in the right place at the@right time, is all...
I couldn't share a Grief Seed with you back then...
...which Tamaki-san absolutely would've done...
This whole time, I've just been scared and@shaking...lost and stuck at a standstill.
I don't deserve the power to save anybody...

group_1.textCenter: Even though I'm a Magical Girl...
...and I have these special abilities I could use@to help people...
...I just keep thinking...
...about everyone I either couldn't help,@or decided against helping.
Things that used to just be unavoidable have@turned into things that aren't right...
Never mind choosing every Magical Girl like@Tamaki-san did...
I can't even be like Yuu-san or Nagisa-san...
...and choose which people I don't want to help.
I never should've become a Magical Girl...
If I didn't have any magic that I could use to help@anyone in the first place...
I wouldn't have to worry about any of this stuff...
I'm glad I became a Magical Girl!
See, if I wasn't a Magical Girl...
...I couldn't do anything OR choose anything.
But now that I am...
...then maybe one day, I'll be able to make even@just one decision.
Being indecisive isn't the end of the world.
It's just a little fault, you know?
I'm pretty thick in the head, so I'm used@to screwing up.
But Mama told me...
...that I can make up for my faults in other ways.
Not everything you can't do is a failure.
Just treat it as a stumbling point.
There's no way that someone who feels bad@about not being able to help people...
...should ever beat themselves up over it!

group_1.textRight: ...If you're gonna suffer any longer, then I'll...
I'll become like Tamaki-san myself!
Tomorrow's me is gonna be the most amazing@Magical Gi—
[flashEffect:flashRed1][chara:104700:effect_shake]Ngh...!
You won't even have to give me any Grief Seeds...
I'll have both of my hands full of them...!
I'll prove to you that our moment together@in your past...
...wasn't a failure— just a stumble!

group_1.textLeft: (...Ah, yeah, I just realized.)
(This girl looks a bit like Tamaki-san, somehow...)
(I'm jealous...)

group_1.textCenter: You're catching on, too, huh?
You worship Tamaki Iroha...
...yet in your heart of hearts, you sympathize@with Yuu and Shii.
Your narrow-minded, cowardly soul fears@righteousness more than most...
...yet you still rebel against it.
You can't stand the shallowness of your own@feelings...
...yet you prioritize them over reason.
Your emotions are so petty that you cannot@compromise.
Everything you've ever ran from is the result@of sin.
Nothing more than immorality and betrayal.
Forget becoming a Magical Girl...
You're actually someone who will be killed by@a Magical Girl...
So there's no need to step forward to tomorrow@anymore, is there?
You are the only one in this universe whose soul@is undeserving of forgiveness.
Your true nature is...
...one that will never reach the sky.
A pitch-black star.
